standards.domain: advanced coursework beyond the current codified K-12 standards corpus
standards.cluster_or_grouping: advanced placement statistics, precalculus, and calculus extensions

standards.coverage_note: Current repository standards corpus does not yet codify College Board AP standards, so these nodes remain explicitly out of scope for direct content-standard alignment.
standards.validation_rationale: The inventory record is explicitly outside the current codified K-12 mathematics standards scope.
